title: The UAE Design System (DLS)
content: Design System from Directories: Components: The UAE Design System is the official design framework for UAE federal government websites. It brings together modular UI components, clear guidelines, and WCAG-compliant patterns to ensure consistency, accessibility, and trust across digital public services. Designed by the TDRA, it supports both designers and developers with Figma files, design tokens, and a TailwindCSS plugin — making it easier to build scalable and user-first interfaces for millions of users across the Emirates. Accessibility Color System Component overview Repository Icons Illustrations Layout Patterns Typography Voice and Tone Accordion Alert banner Avatar Badges Breadcrumb Button Cards Checkbox Date picker Dropdown Link Modal Navigation bar Pagination Popover Progress bar Radio button Select Slider Snackbar Switch Tabs Text area Text field Tooltip
